profiles.accepted_reply_ja: {projectName} の立ち上げを受け取りました。{specialistLabel} が担当します。{learnedHint}まず、何を作るか、誰向けか、最初の成果物をまとめて教えてください。
profiles.accepted_reply_en: I started the project kickoff. {specialistLabel} will handle it. {learnedHint}Tell me what you want to build, who it is for, and the first deliverable.
profiles.progress_reply_ja: 初期要件を受け取りました。{learnedHint}ここから最初の work plan を固めて返します。
profiles.progress_reply_en: I captured the kickoff requirements. {learnedHint}I will turn them into the first work plan now.
reusable_steps: Capture the project brief, audience, and first deliverable.
Translate the brief into the first bounded work items.
Promote durable work candidates for architecture, implementation, and verification.
